name: GH_ParamWireDisplay
summary: Enumerates the possible wire display types for parameters.

enum_values.name: default
enum_values.summary: Wire display is controlled by the application settings.

enum_values.name: faint
enum_values.summary: Wires are displayed faintly (thin and transparent) while the parameter is not selected.

enum_values.name: hidden
enum_values.summary: Wires are not displayed at all while the parameter is not selected.
